description:
## Deep Audit V2: Astro Starlight Documentation Site

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the documentation site at `apps/docs/`.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Content Accuracy** — All component docs match current CEM. No stale API references. All 78+ components documented.
2. **Navigation** — Sidebar structure logical. Categories match component taxonomy. Search works.
3. **Code Examples** — All examples use correct import paths, current API. Examples actually work when copied.
4. **Design Token Docs** — Token reference complete. Light/dark mode documented. Override patterns shown.
5. **Getting Started** — Installation guide, CDN usage, npm usage, Drupal integration all documented and correct.
6. **Accessibility** — Docs site itself meets WCAG 2.1 AA. Color contrast, keyboard navigation, screen reader.
7. **Build** — `npm run build` succeeds. No broken links. No missing images.
8. **Storybook Integration** — Links to Storybook stories work. Component playground references correct.
9. **Astro Configuration** — Starlight config optimized. SEO metadata. Sitemap.
10. **Drupal Consumer Guide** — Twig template examples. CDN integration. Drupal behaviors documentation.

### wc-mcp Tool Usage
Use these MCP tools to cross-reference component documentation accuracy:
- `list_components()` — Get full component inventory
- `get_component({ tagName: "hx-*" })` — Verify docs match CEM for each component
- `get_library_summary()` — Overall library stats for the overview page

If any wc-mcp tool returns unexpected results or errors, report the bug to the wc-tools board at `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools`.

### Deliverables
- Fix all content accuracy issues
- Update stale API references
- Add missing component documentation pages
- Verify all code examples compile/work
- Run `npm run build` in apps/docs to verify no broken build
- Run `npm run verify` before committing
title: DEEP AUDIT: Astro Docs Site — Enterprise Documentation Quality Review

descriptionHistory.description:
## Deep Audit V2: Astro Starlight Documentation Site

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the documentation site at `apps/docs/`.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Content Accuracy** — All component docs match current CEM. No stale API references. All 78+ components documented.
2. **Navigation** — Sidebar structure logical. Categories match component taxonomy. Search works.
3. **Code Examples** — All examples use correct import paths, current API. Examples actually work when copied.
4. **Design Token Docs** — Token reference complete. Light/dark mode documented. Override patterns shown.
5. **Getting Started** — Installation guide, CDN usage, npm usage, Drupal integration all documented and correct.
6. **Accessibility** — Docs site itself meets WCAG 2.1 AA. Color contrast, keyboard navigation, screen reader.
7. **Build** — `npm run build` succeeds. No broken links. No missing images.
8. **Storybook Integration** — Links to Storybook stories work. Component playground references correct.
9. **Astro Configuration** — Starlight config optimized. SEO metadata. Sitemap.
10. **Drupal Consumer Guide** — Twig template examples. CDN integration. Drupal behaviors documentation.

### wc-mcp Tool Usage
Use these MCP tools to cross-reference component documentation accuracy:
- `list_components()` — Get full component inventory
- `get_component({ tagName: "hx-*" })` — Verify docs match CEM for each component
- `get_library_summary()` — Overall library stats for the overview page

If any wc-mcp tool returns unexpected results or errors, report the bug to the wc-tools board at `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools`.

### Deliverables
- Fix all content accuracy issues
- Update stale API references
- Add missing component documentation pages
- Verify all code examples compile/work
- Run `npm run build` in apps/docs to verify no broken build
- Run `npm run verify` before committing
